Sql: SELECT cat, Tot, v, Cnt FROM (SELECT *, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY cat ORDER BY Cnt DESC) AS _rn1 FROM (SELECT _src.cat, _src.v, _prev.Tot, COUNT(*) AS Cnt FROM (SELECT * FROM (VALUES ('a', 10), ('b', 20), ('b', 20), ('c', 5)) AS t(cat, v)) AS _src INNER JOIN (SELECT cat, Tot FROM (SELECT *, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY Tot DESC) AS _rn0 FROM (SELECT cat, COALESCE(SUM(v), 0) AS Tot FROM (VALUES ('a', 10), ('b', 20), ('b', 20), ('c', 5)) AS t(cat, v) GROUP BY cat)) WHERE _rn0 <= 2) AS _prev ON _src.cat = _prev.cat GROUP BY _src.cat, _src.v, _prev.Tot)) WHERE _rn1 <= 5 ORDER BY cat ASC, v ASC
